title: Performance Metrics Path
description: Build fluency in Performance Metrics inside Model Evaluation by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: AgentBench-II (Evaluation)
steps.summary: ** AgentBench-II (Evaluation) belongs to the Model Evaluation area of AI/ML, within Performance Metrics. It sits inside Model Evaluation / Performance Metrics. Start after Evaluation and Model Evaluation.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: AgentBench++ (2025 Evaluation Suite)
steps.summary: ** AgentBench++ (2025 Evaluation Suite) belongs to the Model Evaluation area of AI/ML, within Performance Metrics. It sits inside Model Evaluation / Performance Metrics. Start after Evaluation and Model Evaluation.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Stratified Cross Validation
steps.summary: Stratified Cross Validation belongs to the Model Evaluation area of AI/ML, within Performance Metrics. It sits inside Model Evaluation / Performance Metrics. Start after Model Validation and Cross-validation. It opens into K-Fold Stratified Cross-Validation and Stratified K-fold cross validation.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Leave-P-Out Cross-Validation
steps.summary: Leave-P-Out Cross-Validation belongs to the Model Evaluation area of AI/ML, within Performance Metrics. It sits inside Model Evaluation / Performance Metrics. Start after Model Validation and Cross-validation. It opens into Leave-one-out cross validation and Leave-One-Out Cross-Validation (LOOCV).
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Repeated Cross Validation
steps.summary: Repeated Cross Validation belongs to the Model Evaluation area of AI/ML, within Performance Metrics. It sits inside Model Evaluation / Performance Metrics. Start after Model Validation and Cross-validation. It opens into Repeated K-fold cross validation.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: calibration error
steps.summary: calibration error belongs to the Model Evaluation area of AI/ML, within Performance Metrics. It sits inside Model Evaluation / Performance Metrics. Start after Model Calibration. It opens into Expected Calibration Error and maximum calibration error (MCE).
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Blocked cross validation
steps.summary: Blocked cross validation belongs to the Model Evaluation area of AI/ML, within Performance Metrics. It sits inside Model Evaluation / Performance Metrics. Start after Model Validation and Cross-validation. It opens into Blocked time series cross validation.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Expected Calibration Error
steps.summary: Expected Calibration Error belongs to the Model Evaluation area of AI/ML, within Performance Metrics. It sits inside Model Evaluation / Performance Metrics. Start after calibration error and Model Calibration. It opens into Expected Calibration Error (ECE) and Calibration Metrics (e.g., Expected Calibration Error).
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
